headline: Software Engineer | AI/ML Practitioner | Women Techmaker Ambassador | Mother 🇵🇾 🇺🇸
intro: Hola! I’m Carmen 👋🏽, a Software Engineer with roots in Paraguay 🇵🇾 and a career shaped in the San Francisco Bay Area, CA 🇺🇸. I focus on creating calm, intentional digital experiences that blend design, clarity, and thoughtful engineering.
intro_alt: I am a Software Engineer born and raised in Asunción, Paraguay 🇵🇾, and based in the Bay Area, CA.🌉 🇺🇸
shortBio: Hola! I’m Carmen 👋🏽, a proud Paraguayan Software Engineer based in the Bay Area, CA 🇵🇾 🇺🇸. Driven in agile environments, I have gained my full-stack expertise working in fast-paced start-ups across Fintech, Health and Wellness, and HR.  I am actively pursuing courses to deepen my knowledge of AI and ML so that I can support my kid and his generation in facing tomorrow's (today) challenges.

In my spare time, I enjoy immersing myself in workshops and seminars focused on personal development. I love traveling the world, exploring new places, taking pictures in my walks / hikings, and cooking healthy meals. I cherish quality time with my son doing fun activities like Lego building, hiking and playing soccer and basketball. When I have some me-time, I indulge in reading, playing piano and/or practicing kickboxing.
shortBioI: Hola! I’m Carmen 👋🏽, a proud Paraguayan 🇵🇾 Software Engineer based in the Bay Area, CA 🇺🇸. Skilled in agile, fast-paced start-ups across Fintech, Health & Wellness, and HR, I’m expanding my AI and ML knowledge to help my child and his generation tackle future challenges.

In my spare time, I dive into personal development workshops, love traveling, capturing moments on hikes, and cooking healthy meals. I treasure quality time with my son, building Legos, hiking, and playing sports. For myself, I enjoy reading, playing piano, and practicing kickboxing.
bio: Computers and sports battled for my attention growing up. I would often skip my English classes to hit the tennis courts. My love for soccer saw me playing for both of my universities, and I even played field hokey for a couple of years!

As the years went by, my curiosity grew stronger as I watched my oldest brother become increasingly immersed in technology. Before I knew it, I found myself eagerly waiting for him to leave for work or school, so I could secretly play on his computer.

Starting my tech journey in Paraguay was quite the adventure, especially as a woman in a field where you could hardly find any ladies around. Picture this: a traditional Catholic family, my dad's a military engineer, my mom's a dentist, and my brothers are all about engineering, just like dad. Chances were NaN 😅

Sticking to traditional gender roles was the norm in my home, so me diving into Software Engineering was kind of a big deal. But I was captivated by technology and its potential, so I secretly chased my dream with the help of my super hero Ñate (mi Mami), I studied for a business major at one university as my dad suggested, while surreptitiously studying computer systems analysis at another.

Today, driven by a profound sense of responsibility, my curiosity has naturally led me deeper into AI and machine learning. I continue learning through reading, hands-on experimentation, and building because I want to understand the technologies shaping the world my son is growing up in. As both a software engineer and a mother, I believe it's important to help prepare him and his generation for the opportunities and challenges ahead.
mojo: I am constantly 'baking' new skills and ideas! My mojo is "Never stop LEARNING because life never stops TEACHING".

workExperience.title: Software Engineering Consultant (Full-Stack Focus)
description: Architect and deliver full-stack SaaS features from concept to production for startups, utilizing React, Next.js, and Ruby on Rails.
Incorporate modern AI workflows (Gemini, Copilot) to accelerate codebase boilerplate, test automation, and feature delivery.
Designed an AI educational framework for K-8 students that boosted program engagement by 30%.
Co-led cloud training for 50 women in tech in partnership with Google Cloud, Kuñatech, and SheWorks.

workExperience.title: Solutions Engineer
description: Integrated the Lokalise API with Django to automate localization, streamlining feature launches for US and Canadian markets.
Built configurable frontend components utilizing metadata configurations, reducing platform setup error rates.

workExperience.title: Delivery Lead – Software Engineer
description: Designed 10+ Rails REST APIs, including a real-time Clover POS integration serving 175,000+ business clients.
Developed background-job driven HR engagement tooling (Sidekiq) that grew active participation by 33%.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Programmed a backend data service (Eligible API, Sidekiq) for bulk employee data imports, saving health providers 144 hours of manual data processing.
Launched the platform's Spanish onboarding flow (Rails I18n), growing customer reach by 14%.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Re-engineered quote application using Rails and React, reducing quote response latency from 24 hours to under 3 minutes and boosting conversions by 50%.

coreStrengths.title: Product Mindset
coreStrengths.description: I enjoy building software that solves real problems, balancing technical decisions with product goals and the people using it.

coreStrengths.title: Curiosity & Innovation
coreStrengths.description: I'm always learning. Lately that means AI and intelligent workflows, but curiosity has been the constant throughout my career.

coreStrengths.title: Community Impact
coreStrengths.description: Some of my most rewarding work happens outside the code—mentoring, speaking, and helping technology become more accessible.
